name: instantgmp
description: InstantGMP read-only MCP servers (Inventory, Setup, Logs, EBR, QMS, Projects, Docs) and the InstantGMP usage skill that enforces 21 CFR Part 11, cGMP, and GAMP 5 constraints. Each user supplies their own InstantGMP URL and API credentials via the bundled setup script; named profiles let support staff switch between servers.
